zh.Glamorganshire, Wales: 英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根
zh.lifeSummary: Grono Ap Ivor Hir Vachan是Howell ap Ivor Vachan和Wenllian Ap Jevan的兒子，於1342年出生在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根。他於1380年與Catherina Ap Jenkins在威爾士格拉莫爾根結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1407年在他的家鄉享年65歲。

zh-hans.Glamorganshire, Wales: 英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Grono Ap Ivor Hir Vachan是Howell ap Ivor Vachan和Wenllian Ap Jevan的儿子，于1342年出生在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根。他于1380年与Catherina Ap Jenkins在威尔士格拉莫爾根结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1407年在他的家乡享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Geza, Jeno, Arpad, Attila, Csaba.

Hungarian: variant of   Papp  , meaning ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’. This surname is also found in Romania, Slovakia, Croatia, and Serbia, and also among Rusyns (in Serbia and Croatia). See also   Pop   2 and   Popa  .
English: variant of   Pape   1.

variants.name: Papp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Laszlo, Zoltan, Geza, Istvan, Gabor, Miklos, Tibor, Arpad, Denes, Imre, Attila.
German (Bavaria, Tyrol): from Middle High German pap ‘baby food’, Dutch pap ‘porridge, pap’, hence perhaps a nickname denoting someone who had lost his teeth or subsisted on a meager diet.

Hungarian: from pap ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’, probably an occupational name for someone in the service of a priest or a nickname for a pious person. This surname is also found in Romania and Slovakia, and also among Rusyns. Compare Pap and Pop .

nameMeanings.name: Ivor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: (i) relationship name from Old Scandinavian Ívarr, Iwar, Ivar ‘yew-army’. (ii) relationship name, possibly from the Welsh male given name Ifor; if so, it is not clear that it survives today.

variants.name: Ivers
meanings: Irish: from Ó hÍomhair, ‘descendant of Íomhar’, a Gaelic form of the Old Norse personal name Ívarr (see Iverson 2), with excrescent English -s. It is occasionally Anglicized as Howard . Also a shortened form of Mac Íomhair ‘son of Íomhar’, with excrescent English -s. See McIver .
North German: patronymic from the personal name Ivar (see Iversen ).

English: variant of Iver, with post-medieval excrescent -s, a habitational name from Iver (Buckinghamshire) named from Old English ȳfre ‘edge or brow of a hill, tip of a promontory’, or from a minor place called with the same word.

variants.name: Iver
meanings: 1 English: locative name from Iver (Bucks) named from Old English * ȳfre ‘edge or brow of a hill, tip of a promontory’, or from a minor place named with the same word.
2 Scottish: (i) relationship name, reduced form of Irish and Scottish Gaelic Mac Íomhair, see McIvor . (ii) relationship name from the Old Scandinavian personal name Ivar; see Ivor .

variants.name: Iverson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Iver, Erik, Hjalmer, Lars, Selmer, Thor, Evald, Gunner, Helmer, Ingman, Jarl, Joneen.
Americanized form of Norwegian, Danish, and North German Iversen and of Swedish Ivarsson (see Ivarson ), all cognates of 2 below.

English (Kent and London): patronymic from Old Norse Ívarr, Iwar, Ivar, a compound of either ív ‘yew tree, bow’ or Ing (the name of a god) + ar ‘warrior’ or ‘spear’. Alternatively, the name might be a patronymic from the Welsh male personal name Ifor, itself from British Celtic Iūdomāros ‘lord’ + ‘great’, but if so, it is not clear that it survives today.

nameMeanings.name: Hir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Sier  , unexplained. This surname is very rare in Germany.
Czech (Šír): nickname from Middle High German schīr ‘sheer, pure, clean’. Compare Schier .

variants.name: Sier
meanings: Dutch and German: from a short form of the personal name Sierik, Sierich, composed of the ancient Germanic elements sigi ‘victory’ + rīc ‘power(ful)’, or from a short form of the personal name Sigihard, composed of the ancient Germanic elements sigi + hari ‘army’.
English: variant of   Syer  .

nameMeanings.name: Vachan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Fernand, Jacques, Normand, Pierre, Adelard, Edmour, Emile, Francoise, Lucien, Michel, Adrien.
French: from a derivative of vache ‘cow’ (from Latin vacca), most likely applied as an occupational name for a cowherd.
History: Paul Vachon from La Copechagnière in Vendée, France, married Marguerite Langlois in Quebec City, QC, in 1653.

nameMeanings.name: Grono
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Goronwy .

variants.name: Goronwy
meanings: Traditional name of uncertain derivation, borne in the Mabinogi by Goronwy the Staunch , Lord of Penllyn. He became the lover of the flower-maiden Blodeuedd and murdered her husband Lleu Llaw Gyffes , but Lleu was later restored to life and definitively dispatched Goronwy.

en.lifeSummary: Grono Ap Ivor Hir Vachan was born in 1342, in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom as the son of Howell ap Ivor Vachan and Wenllian Ap Jevan. He married Catherina Ap Jenkins in 1380, in Glamorgan, Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1407, in his hometown, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Grono Ap Ivor Hir Vachan est né en 1342, à Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, fils de Howell ap Ivor Vachan et Wenllian Ap Jevan. Il a épousé Catherina Ap Jenkins en 1380, à Glamorgan, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1407, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Grono Ap Ivor Hir Vachan wurde 1342 in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Howell ap Ivor Vachan und Wenllian Ap Jevan geboren. Er hat 1380 in Glamorgan, Wales Catherina Ap Jenkins geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1407 im Alter von 65 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Grono Ap Ivor Hir Vachan è nato il nel 1342 nel Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito come figlio di Howell ap Ivor Vachan e Wenllian Ap Jevan. Lui sposato Catherina Ap Jenkins nel 1380, nel Glamorgan, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1407, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Grono Ap Ivor Hir Vachanは1342年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンでHowell ap Ivor VachanとWenllian Ap Jevanの息子として生まれた。1380年にウェールズグラモーガンでCatherina Ap Jenkinsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1407年に故郷で65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Grono Ap Ivor Hir Vachan(은)는 1342년 영국 웨일스 글램르건에서 Howell ap Ivor Vachan(와)과 Wenllian Ap Jevan의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1380년 웨일스 글램르건에서 Catherina Ap Jenkins(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1407년 그의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Grono Ap Ivor Hir Vachan nasceu em 1342, em Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom filho de Howell ap Ivor Vachan e Wenllian Ap Jevan. Ele casou-se com Catherina Ap Jenkins em 1380, em Glamorgan, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1407, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Grono Ap Ivor Hir Vachan родился в 1342 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Howell ap Ivor Vachan и Wenllian Ap Jevan. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherina Ap Jenkins в 1380 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1407 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 65 лет.

sm.1335 to 1340: mai le 1335 e o'o I le 1340

es.lifeSummary: Grono Ap Ivor Hir Vachan nació en 1342, en Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido como hijo de Howell ap Ivor Vachan y Wenllian Ap Jevan. Se casó con Catherina Ap Jenkins en 1380, en Glamorgan, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1407, en su pueblo, a la edad de 65 años.
